purpose: Rebuild Command Center as compact interactive review workboard instead of brochure/static demo page.
changes: Replaced patient-risk percentage display with 0-10 Review Score wording.
Added rotating simulated de-identified queue snapshots.
Made Priority Tier, Primary Driver, Trend, Lead-Time Context, and Workflow State visible in the top workboard.
Added pause/resume and rotate snapshot controls.
Kept validation percentages separate from patient-level Review Score.
claims_guardrail: Retrospective aggregate evidence only. Decision support only. No diagnosis, treatment direction, clinician replacement, or independent escalation.
raw_data_policy: No raw row-level MIMIC, eICU, or HiRID files are committed.
